1088 |     def _analysis_read_guardrail_prompt(self) -> str | None:
1089 |         """Prompt the agent to synthesize broad analysis before reading more files."""
1090 |         state = getattr(self, "_analysis_phase_state", None)
1091 |         if state is not None and state.enabled:
1092 |             if state.phase != "synthesize" or state.synthesize_requested:
1093 |                 return None
1094 |             state.synthesize_requested = True
1095 |             state.phase_summaries.append(self._build_analysis_phase_summary())
1096 |             ledger = getattr(self, "_evidence_ledger", None)
1097 |             if ledger is not None:
1098 |                 ledger.summarize_phase_semantically(
1099 |                     "inspect",
1100 |                     self._backend,
1101 |                     task_description=getattr(self, "_current_task_description", ""),
1102 |                 )
1103 |             task_desc = getattr(self, "_current_task_description", "")
1104 |             return (
1105 |                 "[SYSTEM] Phased analysis controller:\n"
1106 |                 f"You have completed the Inspect phase after reading {len(state.files_read)} files.\n"
1107 |                 "Do not read more files now.\n"
1108 |                 "Synthesize:\n"
1109 |                 "- confirmed architecture\n"
1110 |                 "- confirmed issues\n"
1111 |                 "- uncertainty\n"
1112 |                 "- named gaps\n"
1113 |                 "Then either answer or request one specific verification read.\n\n"
1114 |                 f"[TASK ANCHOR] Your current task is: {task_desc}"
1115 |             )
1116 | 
1117 |         if self._task_intent != "analysis":
1118 |             return None
1119 |         if getattr(self, "_analysis_read_guardrail_injected", False):
1120 |             return None
1121 |         accessed = sorted(getattr(self, "_accessed_files", set()))
1122 |         if len(accessed) < 5:
1123 |             return None
1124 |         self._analysis_read_guardrail_injected = True
1125 |         files = ", ".join(accessed[:8])
1126 |         if len(accessed) > 8:
1127 |             files += f", ... and {len(accessed) - 8} more"
1128 |         task_desc = getattr(self, "_current_task_description", "")
1129 |         return (
1130 |             "[SYSTEM] Broad analysis guardrail: you have already read "
1131 |             f"{len(accessed)} distinct files ({files}). Pause broad exploration now. "
1132 |             "Synthesize the architecture, confirmed findings, uncertainty, and next-step gaps from the evidence already read. "
1133 |             "Only read more files if you name a specific gap that cannot be answered from current evidence, and keep any further reads narrowly targeted.\n\n"
1134 |             f"[TASK ANCHOR] Your current task is: {task_desc}"
1135 |         )

1137 |     def _build_task_anchor(self) -> str:
1138 |         """构建任务锚点（任务描述 + 模式 + 策略 + procedural 规则），每步注入。
1139 | 
1140 |         这不是一个独立的记忆子系统 —— 它是 prompt engineering，
1141 |         确保模型在每步推理时都能看到当前任务、约束和相关 procedural 规则。
1142 |         Procedural 规则嵌入此处而非独立消息，确保 compaction 后不丢失。"""
1143 |         parts: list[str] = []
1144 | 
1145 |         task_desc = getattr(self, "_current_task_description", "")
1146 |         if task_desc:
1147 |             parts.append(f"## Current Task\n{task_desc}")
1148 | 
1149 |         if getattr(self, "_task_intent", "edit") == "analysis":
1150 |             parts.append(
1151 |                 "## Task Mode: Analysis\n"
1152 |                 "This is a read-only analysis task. Your workflow is:\n"
1153 |                 "1. Read the relevant code using targeted tools (file_read, file_view, search_text, find_symbol)\n"
1154 |                 "2. Once you have sufficient information, respond directly with your answer\n"
1155 |                 "Do NOT edit files. Do NOT run tests. Respond as soon as you can answer the question."
1156 |             )
1157 | 
1158 |         phase_section = self._build_analysis_phase_anchor()
1159 |         if phase_section:
1160 |             parts.append(phase_section)
1161 | 
1162 |         active_policy = getattr(self, "_active_policy", None)
1163 |         if active_policy is not None:
1164 |             prompt_section = active_policy.to_prompt_section("execution")
1165 |             if prompt_section:
1166 |                 parts.append(prompt_section)
1167 | 
1168 |         # Procedural 记忆按文件锚点注入
1169 |         procedural_section = self._get_procedural_section()
1170 |         if procedural_section:
1171 |             parts.append(procedural_section)
1172 | 
1173 |         if not parts:
1174 |             return ""
1175 | 
1176 |         return "\n\n".join(parts)

1178 |     def _materialize_analysis_history(self, history_dicts: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
1179 |         """Materialize completed phase evidence as compact references for prompts."""
1180 |         state = getattr(self, "_analysis_phase_state", None)
1181 |         ledger = getattr(self, "_evidence_ledger", None)
1182 |         if state is None or not state.enabled or ledger is None or not ledger.phase_summaries:
1183 |             return history_dicts
1184 | 
1185 |         materialized: list[dict] = []
1186 |         for message in history_dicts:
1187 |             content = message.get("content", "")
